Hi there! How can I assist you today?
Hey! Ask me anything about TMU.

Teerthanker Mahaveer University (TMU) is a private university in Moradabad, Uttar Pradesh, established in 2008. It offers programs in engineering, management, medical sciences, law, pharmacy, and more.
You can visit TMU official website: https://www.tmu.ac.in or contact via https://www.tmu.ac.in/contact-us

patterns: what courses are offered in tmu
responses: TMU offers courses in Engineering, Computer Applications, Management, Commerce, Law, Medical Sciences, Pharmacy, Nursing, Agriculture, and more.

patterns: tell me about bca in tmu
responses: BCA is a 3-year undergraduate program covering programming, DBMS, web development, and AI basics. Fee is approx ₹30,500 per semester. Careers include developer, analyst, or MCA.
MCA is a postgraduate program focused on advanced software development, databases, and networking.
TMU offers B.Tech in CSE, Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, AI & ML, and Data Science. Eligibility requires 10+2 with PCM.
M.Tech is a postgraduate engineering program requiring a B.Tech degree.
BBA is a 3-year business management course covering marketing, HR, and finance.
MBA is a postgraduate management program leading to careers in business, finance, and leadership roles.
TMU offers BA LLB, BBA LLB, and LLB programs for legal education.
TMU offers D.Pharm, B.Pharm, and M.Pharm programs for pharmaceutical studies.
TMU offers B.Sc Nursing, GNM, and ANM programs for healthcare education.

TMU has a placement cell with companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and HCL.
TMU offers a vibrant campus life with academics, events, sports, and student activities.
